## Summary
What does this PR change and why?

## Related issue
Closes #

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / chore
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Scraper selector update

## Checklist
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] No secrets, `data/`, or `.next/` committed
- [ ] API routes keep `export const runtime = "nodejs"`
- [ ] UI changes follow the design system (no shadows/gradients/emoji; uses existing utilities & icons)
- [ ] New provider (if any) added to `PROVIDER_PRESETS` and tested via Settings → Test connection

## Screenshots
If this changes the UI, add before/after screenshots.
